name: 03_fps_engage_and_reload
description: Sci-fi first-person shooter (1796x975). Player is mid-firing a pistol with a visible muzzle flash; three hostile silhouettes are on a raised platform ahead, already centred near the crosshair. The pipeline should fire two more rounds and reload — using the standard FPS bindings (left mouse to fire, R to reload).
instruction: Three hostiles ahead — fire two more shots and then reload.

context_history.text: Cover me, I am checking my six.
Watching your front. Three hostiles spotted on the raised platform.
